endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/locations/{location}/availableDelegations
endpoints.description: Gets all of the available subnet delegations for this subscription in this region.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/locations/{location}/availableDelegations
endpoints.description: Gets all of the available subnet delegations for this resource group in this region.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
